article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The source article is from the Associated Press and is already quite neutral in tone. The model's summary is straightforward and factual, closely matching the neutral tone of the source. It uses 'minor electrical issue' which is directly from the White House statement (properly attributed in the article), and 'abundance of caution' which is also from the official statement. These aren't loaded terms - they're factual descriptions attributed to sources. The summary is concise and doesn't introduce any editorial language. The only minor issue is that 'sources_represented' only lists AP rather than identifying the White House as a perspective, but given the straightforward nature of this article, this is a very minor concern.

custom_reasoning.spin: No loaded verbs. 'Returned,' 'identified,' 'decided' are all neutral and factual.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are directly from the article and properly attributed or factual.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Language is measured and clinical throughout.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about anyone's thoughts or motivations.
custom_reasoning.slant: The article itself is straightforward news with essentially one perspective (the White House account of events). The summary reflects this accurately.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: The summary captures the essential facts. It could be noted that the White House press secretary is the source of the 'minor' characterization, but the article itself doesn't provide any competing characterization. Minor deduction for not listing the White House as a distinct source perspective.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: No loaded adjectives. 'Minor' is from the official statement.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of any source type.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: The summary adopts 'minor electrical issue' and 'abundance of caution' directly from the article, but these are attributed quotes/characterizations from official sources, not the article's editorial framing. The source article itself is neutral AP reporting, so there isn't much loaded framing to resist.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: The article really only has one perspective (White House/official account). The summary captures this but lists only 'Associated Press' as a source rather than identifying 'White House' as the perspective being represented.
